## Definition

**Matter** is introduced in this chapter. All things, living and non-living, consist of *matter*, defined as anything that occupies space and has mass.

## Core Principles

Classifier signals: section_heading, bolded_define, freq_multi_section.

Key keywords associated with the organization of matter include: atoms and atomic structure, macronutrients, chemical bonds, chemical reactions, cell structure, and buffers.
